params.name: Human Rights Declaration
params.description: The Human Rights Declaration is a landmark document adopted by the United Nations General Assembly. It was drafted by representatives from around the world with diverse legal and cultural backgrounds, aiming to learn from the lessons of World War II and prevent similar atrocities from happening again. The declaration emphasizes the importance of human dignity and equal rights, stating that neglect of human rights leads to barbarous acts, and calls for the protection of human rights through the r …
